texto: Real education happens only by failing, changing, challenging, and adjusting. All of those gerunds apply to teachers as well as students. No person is an “educator,” because education is not something one person does to another. Education is an imprecise process, a dance, and a collaborative experience.
explicacao: Citação de Siva Vaidhyanathan sobre temas ligados a educacao. “Real education happens only by failing, changing, challenging, and adjusting. All of those gerund…” articula educacao, education, learning em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como learning e teaching.
